subcodes.first_line: Say: O God of the world and Goal of the nations! I beseech Thee by the Luminary whereby the heavens of utterance were illumined for the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل یا اله العالم و مقصود الامم اسئلک بالنیر الذی به انارت سموات البیان لاهل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for teaching, @knowledge; recognition of God
